title: More Overlays Updated
description: Adds NEI-like light overlay for mob spawns, a chunk border overlay and a JEI item search overlay. (updated for 1.15.2, 1.16.5, 1.18.2, 1.19, 1.20 and 1.21)
body:
![More Overlays Updated](https://i.imgur.com/a2dWYac.png)

[  
](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-overlays)This mod adds some of the overlays back from NEI and is available for:

[![](http://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/versions/391382.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-overlays-updated) ([1.15.2](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-overlays-updated/files/all?filter-status=1&filter-game-version=1738749986%3A68722 "Download for 1.15.2"), [1.16.1 - 1.16.5](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-overlays-updated/files/all?filter-status=1&filter-game-version=1738749986%3A70886 "Download for 1.16"), [1.17.1](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-overlays-updated/files/all?filter-status=1&filter-game-version=1738749986%3A73242 "Download for 1.17.1"), [1.18](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-overlays-updated/files/all?filter-status=1&filter-game-version=1738749986%3A73250 "Download for 1.18"), [1.19](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-overlays-updated/files/all?filter-status=1&filter-game-version=1738749986%3A73407 "Download for 1.19"), [1.20](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-overlays-updated/files/all?filter-game-version=1738749986%3a75125 "Download for 1.20"), **Client-Side Only!**).

More Overlays was originally developed by FeldiM245 and is currently maintained and expanded upon by RiDGo8 under the name More Overlays Updated. The mod is currently available for **Forge**, **Fabric** and **NeoForge**.

For Minecraft version 1.14 and below check out the original mod by [FeldiM245](https://www.curseforge.com/members/feldim245):

[![](http://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/versions/243478.svg)](https://minecraft.curseforge.com/projects/more-overlays)

**Overlays:**
-------------

#### **Light Overlay / Mob spawns:**

**F7** : Enable Light Level / Mob spawns Overlay  
Shows a yellow X on blocks where monsters can spawn at night or a red X where monsters can always spawn.

#### ![Light Overlays](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/299/128/2020-06-23_04.png)

####   
**Chunk Boundaries:**

**F9** : Enable Chunk Boundaries Overlay  
Has three modes:  
1st mode: It shows red lines in the corners and a yellow line in the middle of the chunk.  
2nd mode: It also shows a green grid on the edges of the chunk.  
3rd mode: The green grid outlines a Minecraft region and displays the corresponding region save file in the top left corner.

#### **![Chunk Boundaries](https://i.imgur.com/sWQu9PX.png)**

#### **Inventory Item Search (only if JEI is installed)**

**Double-click** on the JEI Search Field for Item Search (Just like in NEI)  
If it is enabled you can search in JEI for items and all items in the currently open inventory that doesn't match the filter will get blacked out.  
Since 1.15 you can also search for custom named items.  
![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/299/133/2020-06-23_21.png)

**Forge and NeoForge**

You can change the config from the Main Screen:   _Mods ->  MoreOverlays -> Config_ or by editing config/moreoverlays.toml

**Fabric**

The config file for Fabric not available currently but will be added in the future.

**Integration**

This mod integrates with some other mods to fix bugs or add features.  
**JustEnoughItems** (by mezz): Item Search only works when JEI is installed since it uses the search algorithm from JEI to highlight items.  
  
**I allow distribution of my mod in modpacks. Would be nice if you give credits** 

  
Reuploading the file is allowed ( But only if the download is free, because commercial use of this mod is against the Minecraft EULA, but you can use my code for anything you want)  
Please try to keep the files on your website updated and **don't lie about the Mod and Minecraft Version. (If there is no file for MC 1.13 don't write in the Tile "More Overlays 1.12 / 1.13" )**
